description: Configure the Wazuh Manager (Agent 000) to support a PCI-DSS compliance workflow. The manager configuration must include a global agent label with key 'compliance' and value 'pci_dss' and be configured to monitor the application log file '/var/log/payment_app.log' using the syslog format. Create a custom detection rule (ID 100250) in local_rules.xml that triggers a level 12 alert when the phrase 'Transaction: VOID' appears in the log, ensuring the rule only triggers if the agent has the 'compliance' label set to 'pci_dss'.
